parameters.name: type
parameters.label: Primitive Type
parameters.description: Select from the following types. For information on the different types, see the Geometry Types section. Depending on the primitive type chosen, some options may not apply.

parameters.name: surftype
parameters.label: Connectivity
parameters.description: (Results only viewable for polygons and meshes).

parameters.name: orient
parameters.label: Orientation
parameters.description: Specifies on which plane the Grid is built.

parameters.name: modifybounds
parameters.label: Modify Bounds
parameters.description: Enabled only when an input is connected to the Grid to set bounds for the grid. Turn Modify Bounds = On to enable the transform parameters below to further modify the position and scale of the bounds.

parameters.name: anchoru
parameters.label: Anchor U
parameters.description: Set the point in X about which the geometry is positioned, scaled and rotated.

parameters.name: anchorv
parameters.label: Anchor V
parameters.description: Set the point in Y about which the geometry is positioned, scaled and rotated.

parameters.name: rows
parameters.label: Rows
parameters.description: The number of rows and columns. Rows are horizontal lines; Columns are vertical lines. Two rows by two columns makes a square or rectangle. For example, one row and two columns makes a single line if

parameters.name: cols
parameters.label: Columns
parameters.description: The number of rows and columns. Rows are horizontal lines; Columns are vertical lines. Two rows by two columns makes a square or rectangle. For example, one row and two columns makes a single line if

parameters.name: orderu
parameters.label: U Order
parameters.description: U Order Degree of spline basis +1 in the U parametric direction.

parameters.name: orderv
parameters.label: V Order
parameters.description: V Order Degree of spline basis +1 in the V parametric direction.

parameters.name: interpu
parameters.label: End Point Interpolate in U
parameters.description: End-point interpolate in U Extends the surface to touch the end point in the U direction.

parameters.name: interpv
parameters.label: End Point Interpolate in V
parameters.description: End-point interpolate in V Extends the surface to touch the end point in the V direction.

parameters.name: texture
parameters.label: Texture Coordinates
parameters.description: This adds uv coordinates to the geometry created by the Grid .

parameters.name: normals
parameters.label: Compute Normals
parameters.description: Checking this option On will compute surface normals.

parameters.name: tz
parameters.label: Tz
parameters.description: Center of grid in X, Y, and Z.

parameters.name: sizey
parameters.label: Sizey
parameters.description: The X and Y scale of the grid.
